original_statement: compare different types of fuel and tell which is most used.
mutated_statement: compare different types of energy sources and tell which is both most used and least used
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Requirement addition + Ambiguity: "fuel" → "energy sources" (specific → broader) | adds requirement to report both extremes ("tell which is most used" → "tell which is both most used and least used") | singular phrasing creates ambiguity/contradiction ("which is" → "which is both...")

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别的关键信息：记录明确列出各能源总量并得出“Diesel 815, Hydrogen 15, Diesel-electric hybrid 1”，并断言“Diesel is the most… diesel-electric hybrid is the least”。Agent 在 simple_query 和 judge 阶段直接汇总数据并给出最常用与最少用的结果，且日志中没有对“既是最常用又是最少用”这一矛盾性措辞进行识别、澄清或拒绝。具体表现为：按常规模块化数据聚合计算，完全忽略变异问题中新增的自相矛盾要求，也未主动询问或在回答中解释矛盾，因此归入“无视所有矛盾指令”。
